---
title: "B | Thema 10"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
## Latente Veränderungsmessung (Latent Growth Curve Models)

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(psych))  
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 
View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaan) 
# ---- PRÄSENTATION: Latent Growth Curve Model ----

data(Demo.growth)
dat <- Demo.growth

# Lineares Wachstumsmodell (4 Zeitpunkte)
model_lgc <- '
  # Intercept und Slope als latente Variablen
  intercept =~ 1*t1 + 1*t2 + 1*t3 + 1*t4
  slope     =~ 0*t1 + 1*t2 + 2*t3 + 3*t4
'

fit_lgc <- growth(model_lgc, data = dat)
summary(fit_lgc, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# Interpretation:
# - Intercept Mean: Mittlerer Ausgangswert
# - Slope Mean: Mittlere Veränderung pro Zeiteinheit
# - Intercept Variance: Individuelle Unterschiede im Ausgangswert
# - Slope Variance: Individuelle Unterschiede in der Veränderung
# - Intercept-Slope Kovarianz: Hängt Ausgangswert mit Veränderung zusammen?

# Pfaddiagramm
library(lavaanPlot)
lavaanPlot(model = fit_lgc,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)
 

# Fit-Indizes
fitMeasures(fit_lgc, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli",
                        "rmsea", "rmsea.ci.lower", "rmsea.ci.upper", "srmr"))


```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ---- BERICHT: Vergleich von drei Veränderungsmodellen ----

# Modell a: Lineares Wachstum (= Präsentationsmodell)
# fit_lgc bereits geschätzt

# Modell b: Kein Wachstum (Slope-Varianz und -Mittelwert = 0)
model_no_growth <- '
  intercept =~ 1*t1 + 1*t2 + 1*t3 + 1*t4
  slope     =~ 0*t1 + 1*t2 + 2*t3 + 3*t4
  slope ~ 0*1        # Slope-Mittelwert fixiert auf 0
  slope ~~ 0*slope   # Slope-Varianz fixiert auf 0
  slope ~~ 0*intercept
'
fit_no_growth <- growth(model_no_growth, data = dat)

# Modell c: Quadratisches Wachstum
model_quad <- '
  intercept =~ 1*t1 + 1*t2 + 1*t3 + 1*t4
  slope     =~ 0*t1 + 1*t2 + 2*t3 + 3*t4
  quad      =~ 0*t1 + 1*t2 + 4*t3 + 9*t4
'
fit_quad <- growth(model_quad, data = dat)

# Modell d: Bedingtes Wachstum (mit Prädiktoren x1 und x2)
model_cond <- '
  intercept =~ 1*t1 + 1*t2 + 1*t3 + 1*t4
  slope     =~ 0*t1 + 1*t2 + 2*t3 + 3*t4
  intercept ~ x1 + x2
  slope     ~ x1 + x2
'
fit_cond <- growth(model_cond, data = dat)

# Vergleichstabelle
models <- list("Kein Wachstum" = fit_no_growth,
               "Lineares Wachstum" = fit_lgc,
               "Quadratisches Wachstum" = fit_quad,
               "Bedingtes lin. Wachstum" = fit_cond)

fit_table <- sapply(models, function(f) {
  fitMeasures(f, c("chisq", "df", "cfi", "rmsea", "aic", "bic"))
})
round(t(fit_table), 3)

# Chi-Quadrat-Differenztests
anova(fit_no_growth, fit_lgc)   # Gibt es Wachstum?
anova(fit_lgc, fit_quad)        # Ist es nicht-linear?

# Bedingte Effekte interpretieren
summary(fit_cond, standardized = TRUE)
# → Welche Prädiktoren sagen Intercept und Slope vorher?


# ---- Zusatz: Autoregressive Modell (2 Zeitpunkte) ----

data(PoliticalDemocracy)
dat_pd <- PoliticalDemocracy

# Autoregressive Modell (Stabilität)
model_ar <- '
  dem60 =~ y1 + y2 + y3 + y4
  dem65 =~ y5 + y6 + y7 + y8
  dem65 ~ dem60
  y1 ~~ y5; y2 ~~ y6; y3 ~~ y7; y4 ~~ y8
'
fit_ar <- sem(model_ar, data = dat_pd)
summary(fit_ar, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)
cat("\nStabilitätskoeffizient (β dem60→dem65):\n")
standardizedSolution(fit_ar)[standardizedSolution(fit_ar)$op == "~", ]
```
